chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.94 of 2020 Muhammad Abrar Ahmed Qureshi Versus Iftikhar Ahmed Qureshi and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of CMA No.105/2021 (U/O-I, R-10 CPC). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For hearing of CMA No.834/2020 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 22.05.2024 Mr. Farhan Zia Abrar, Advocate for the appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the appellant on instructions does not press this appeal, which is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
